name: Hind
license: Open Source / SIL Open Font License
description:
Hind is an open source typeface family developed explicitly for use in User Interface design. The Hind font family includes five styles. Hind’s letterforms have a humanist-style construction, which is paired with seemingly monolinear strokes. Most of these strokes have flat endings: they either terminate with a horizontal or a vertical shear, rather than on a diagonal. This helps create clear-cut counter forms between the characters. In addition to this, Hind’s letterforms feature open apertures. The entire typeface family feels very legible when used to set text.

Hind is licensed under the SIL Open Font License. You can find more details about this project here.
